figures.caption: Figure 1: System architecture. The Meta-Evolution Loop (green, outer) optimizes the evolution protocol Λ by running the Harness Evolution Loop (blue, inner) across diverse training tasks t1, t2, . . . , tn. Each inner loop instance optimizes a worker harnessH for a single task through iterative cycles of execution (Worker), evaluation (Evaluator), and code modification (Evolution Agent). The meta-evolution agent aggregates scores across all tasks and modifies the evolution protocol, feeding the updated protocol back for the next round. The output is the best-performing evolution protocol Λ(best).
Table 1: Correspondence between meta-learning and meta-evolution
